summary: Iteration 61: Global System Snapshot v2 structure VERIFIED. Major refactor from weather-biased v1 to balanced v2 structure. All 21 backend tests passed. UI Export Snapshot button working correctly.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/debug/ui-snapshot returns 200 - PASS
Snapshot has top-level keys: freshness, portfolio, strategies - PASS
Old v1 keys removed (positions, position_counts, lifecycle, etc.) - PASS
freshness has all required fields (snapshot_at, version=2.0, etc.) - PASS
portfolio.capital_allocation has strategy bucket data - PASS
portfolio.pnl_by_strategy has PnL data per strategy - PASS
portfolio.concentration_risk has HHI, top_3_pct, largest_position - PASS
strategies has all 4 sections: weather, weather_asymmetric, crypto, arb - PASS
strategies.weather has: positions, scan_health, lifecycle, entry_quality, config - PASS
strategies.weather_asymmetric has: positions, scan_health, config - PASS
strategies.crypto has: positions, scan_health, execution_stats, volatility, config - PASS
strategies.arb has: positions, scan_health, execution_stats, diagnostics, config - PASS
All positions have: invested, current_value, profit_multiple, unrealized_pnl - PASS
Crypto positions have strategy_meta (asset, time_window) - PASS
Arb positions have strategy_meta (market_type) - PASS
Weather positions have lifecycle enrichment when evaluated - PASS
GET /api/debug/state-snapshot returns 403 without key - PASS
GET /api/debug/state-snapshot returns 200 with X-Debug-Snapshot-Key header - PASS
GET /api/debug/state-snapshot returns 200 with ?key= query param - PASS
Position counts match between portfolio and strategy sections - PASS
Snapshot balanced across all strategies (not weather-biased) - PASS
frontend_ui_tests: App loads successfully with 86 open positions - PASS
Weather page displays 54 weather positions - PASS
Lifecycle (26) tab visible and navigable - PASS
Exit Reason Distribution shows: Time Inefficient(22), Profit Capture(2), Negative Edge(2) - PASS
Export Snapshot button visible and clickable - PASS

snapshot_v2_structure.description: New v2 structure with freshness, portfolio, strategies top-level keys

portfolio_capital_allocation.description: Each strategy bucket has capital_deployed, pct_of_total, position_count, unrealized_pnl

portfolio_pnl_by_strategy.description: Each strategy has realized_pnl, trade_count, win_rate, profit_factor
portfolio_pnl_by_strategy.evidence: All strategy buckets have pnl_by_strategy entries

strategy_sections_balanced.description: All 4 strategies have similar depth (positions, scan_health, config + strategy-specific)

position_required_fields.description: All positions have invested, current_value, profit_multiple, unrealized_pnl

crypto_strategy_meta.description: Crypto positions have strategy_meta with asset and time_window

arb_strategy_meta.description: Arb positions have strategy_meta with market_type

weather_lifecycle_enrichment.description: Weather positions have lifecycle data when evaluated
weather_lifecycle_enrichment.evidence: 26 exit candidates with exit_reason, profit_multiple, book_rank

export_snapshot_ui.description: Export Snapshot button works on Lifecycle tab

critical_code_review_comments: v2 structure correctly removes weather bias - all strategies now have equal depth
_build_state_snapshot() properly partitions positions by strategy bucket
strategy_meta added for crypto (asset, time_window) and arb (market_type)
Auth correctly enforced on state-snapshot endpoint
seed_data_creation: None - tested with live MongoDB data (86 total positions: 54 weather, 11 crypto, 21 arb)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 61 verified the Global System Snapshot v2 refactor. Key changes from v1: (1) Top-level keys changed from flat structure (positions, position_counts, lifecycle, entry_quality, pnl_summary, strategy_health, weather_config) to hierarchical (freshness, portfolio, strategies). (2) portfolio section has capital_allocation (per-strategy), pnl_by_strategy, concentration_risk. (3) Each strategy (weather, weather_asymmetric, crypto, arb) now has its own section with positions, scan_health, and strategy-specific data (lifecycle/entry_quality for weather, execution_stats/volatility for crypto, execution_stats/diagnostics for arb). (4) All positions now include: invested, current_value, profit_multiple, unrealized_pnl. (5) Crypto positions have strategy_meta {asset, time_window}. (6) Arb positions have strategy_meta {market_type}. Current position counts: 54 weather, 11 crypto, 21 arb = 86 total.
